item.title: Farm Auction Sales Day
item.description: A look at a farm auction event featuring equipment sales, bidding activity, and how agricultural machinery changes hands in the market.

media:content.media:title: Farm Auction Sales Day
media:content.media:description: A look at a farm auction event featuring equipment sales, bidding activity, and how agricultural machinery changes hands in the market.

item.title: Taking It Slow on the Farm
item.description: A calm farming day focused on steady field work, careful equipment use, and taking time to complete agricultural tasks properly.

media:content.media:title: Taking It Slow on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A calm farming day focused on steady field work, careful equipment use, and taking time to complete agricultural tasks properly.

item.title: A month of farming with Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms shares a look at a month of farming in Harvest Marathon 2025 Pt. 2.

media:content.media:title: A month of farming with Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shares a look at a month of farming in Harvest Marathon 2025 Pt. 2.

item.title: A Monday on the Farm
item.description: A routine Monday on the farm showing daily tasks, field work, and equipment use as the week begins in agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Monday on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A routine Monday on the farm showing daily tasks, field work, and equipment use as the week begins in agricultural operations.

item.title: It’s the Wrong Ones
item.description: A farm mix-up leads to unexpected results during field work, highlighting problem-solving and adjustments in daily agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: It’s the Wrong Ones
media:content.media:description: A farm mix-up leads to unexpected results during field work, highlighting problem-solving and adjustments in daily agricultural operations.

item.title: 1998 Truck at 200K Miles
item.description: A look at a 1998 model truck reaching 200,000 miles, covering durability, maintenance history, and real-world farm use.

media:content.media:title: 1998 Truck at 200K Miles
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1998 model truck reaching 200,000 miles, covering durability, maintenance history, and real-world farm use.

item.title: Equipment From the Trees
item.description: A farm discovery involving equipment found or recovered near wooded areas, showing inspection, cleanup, and potential restoration work.

media:content.media:title: Equipment From the Trees
media:content.media:description: A farm discovery involving equipment found or recovered near wooded areas, showing inspection, cleanup, and potential restoration work.

item.title: Finding Farm Treasure
item.description: A surprising discovery on the farm uncovering old or valuable items, exploring their history, condition, and possible use.

media:content.media:title: Finding Farm Treasure
media:content.media:description: A surprising discovery on the farm uncovering old or valuable items, exploring their history, condition, and possible use.

item.title: Questioning a John Deere Design
item.description: A close look at a John Deere machine feature, discussing design choices, usability, and real-world farm performance concerns.

media:content.media:title: Questioning a John Deere Design
media:content.media:description: A close look at a John Deere machine feature, discussing design choices, usability, and real-world farm performance concerns.

item.title: Farming Mode Activated
item.description: A full day of farm operations in action, showing equipment running, field work in progress, and the shift into peak farming season.

media:content.media:title: Farming Mode Activated
media:content.media:description: A full day of farm operations in action, showing equipment running, field work in progress, and the shift into peak farming season.

item.title: Farming Mode Activated on the Farm
item.description: A busy day of field work showing tractors and equipment in action as the farm shifts into full operational mode.

media:content.media:title: Farming Mode Activated on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A busy day of field work showing tractors and equipment in action as the farm shifts into full operational mode.

item.title: Yard Testing a Parked Machine
item.description: Testing a parked farm machine in the yard, checking functionality, performance, and readiness before returning it to field work.

media:content.media:title: Yard Testing a Parked Machine
media:content.media:description: Testing a parked farm machine in the yard, checking functionality, performance, and readiness before returning it to field work.
